summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Smart Study Planner. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend functional after fixing Pomodoro SelectItem bug. All major flows tested and working.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem value='' causes Radix UI runtime crash: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'. Fixed by changing value to 'none'.

critical_code_review_comments: PomodoroPage.jsx line 235: SelectItem value='' is invalid in Radix UI — fixed to value='none' with null coercion on submit
Logout button is inside a DropdownMenu (not directly accessible) - this is correct UX design, test must click user-menu-trigger first
seed_data_creation: Test subjects (TEST_Mathematics, TEST_TopicSubject x2, TEST_SessionSubject x2), topics, and sessions created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% healthy. All frontend flows work. Pomodoro SelectItem empty string bug was fixed (value='none'). Admin login, register, dashboard, subjects, calendar, pomodoro, AI planner generation (loading state confirmed), theme toggle, logout all verified. AI plan generation actually calls Gemini - loading state confirmed but full response not awaited (skipped as per instructions).
rca_of_the_issue: Pomodoro page crashed on load because Radix UI Select component does not allow SelectItem with value=''. When subjects were empty, the page would render SelectItem value='' for 'No subject' option, triggering React runtime error. Fix: change value to 'none' and coerce to null when posting to backend.
